use_cases: Displaying status indicators or labels in application interfaces
Showing category tags on content cards or list items
Indicating counts or metadata on dashboard elements
Creating notification badges with count overlays
Rendering pill-style labels for form field indicators
ai_summary: A lightweight badge component using class-variance-authority for variant management. Supports four variants (default, secondary, destructive, outline) with standard hover state transitions. Built with Tailwind CSS utility classes for easy theming and consistent styling across applications. The component extends native HTML div elements with accessible focus ring states.
